input_dict.question: Shownu, Kihyun, Hyungwon, Wonho, Minhyuk, and I.M. and what other South Korean comprise a group created in 2015?
input_dict.source_summary: Missing bridge fact: identity of the "other South Korean" member not listed in the question — passage [1] explicitly lists Jooheon as that member; no additional retrieval needed. Jooheon is a South Korean rapper and songwriter (born Lee Ho-joon on October 6, 1994).
input_dict.target_summary: Context: The question asks which other South Korean, alongside Shownu, Kihyun, Hyungwon, Wonho, Minhyuk, and I.M., comprises a group created in 2015. Evidence integration: Monsta X is a South Korean boy group formed by Starship Entertainment through the Mnet survival show "No.Mercy" in 2015. The group is composed of seven members: Jooheon, Shownu, Kihyun, Hyungwon, Wonho, Minhyuk, and I.M. Lee Joo-heon (born Lee Ho-joon on October 6, 1994), known professionally as Jooheon, is a South Korean rapper and songwriter and is a member of Monsta X. These sourced facts supply the identity of the additional South Korean member referenced in the question.
